name: Turkey Mango Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups shredded spinach and iceberg lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the dressing ingredients in a large bowl until fully blended.
2. Add the turkey, mango, strawberries, and scallions to the salad mixture. Stir gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
3. Spoon the salad onto individual plates or a serving platter, garnishing with small spinach leaves.
Serves 6. Per serving: 210 calories, 22g protein, 13g carbohydrates, 8g fat, 54mg cholesterol, 254mg sodium. Exchanges: 1 vegetable, 1/2 fruit, 2 1/2 lean meat.
